Sarnak Earring of Station  
 

No Trade
Slot: EAR
AC: 5
STR: +5
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Sarnak Earring of Station
No Trade
Slot: EAR
AC: 5
STR: +5
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-27 04:40:39
Page Updated:Mon Aug 15th, 2022

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 40
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Burning Woods
NPC Name
a sarnak extremist
a sarnak zealot - Burning Woods

Chardok
NPC Name
a Di`zok Invoker
a Di`zok Librarian
a Di`zok Soldier
a Di`zok Warlord
a Shai`din Soldier
Arch Inspector Nibi`zi

Crypt of Dalnir
NPC Name
a kly evoker

Frontier Mountains
NPC Name
a Sarnak enthusiast
a sarnak partisan

Halls of Betrayal (Chardok B)
NPC Name
a spectral betrayer

Lake of Ill Omen
NPC Name
a Sarnak adherent
a sarnak revealer

The Overthere
NPC Name
a Sarnak enthusiast


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Burning Woods
Chardok
Crypt of Dalnir
Frontier Mountains
Halls of Betrayal (Chardok B)
Lake of Ill Omen
The Overthere

#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 04 2003 at 1:45 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) these would never EVER rock! maybe if you were the first player on beta and found these, then MAYBE. OMG...i can't believe you wrote this in 2003. tard

# Mar 21 2003 at 9:10 AM Rating: Decent

8 posts
I was soloing in BW this morning with my level 52 SK and had one drop off a sarnak enthusiast.
▲ Page top
Aye, are rare
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2003 at 9:30 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1695600986541
Scholar
63 posts
Rare as hell, but got one while runnin through OT to HS... Anyways, it's kinda funny because i always wanted one for my SK a while back, i've killed many sarnaks in Dalnir, LOIO, and Chardok... Guess these things really are just a chance drop. I didn't loot it, just gave a /loc and kept on a' truckin, hoping someone got it that will use it (no-drop). Anyways, if you got one on your melee, not bad at all from old world, and should serve you well. If you're looking to get one, all I can say is good luck, they drop rarely, and in a large range of zones... Just kill sarnaks by the millions, LOL. Good luck.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 12 2003 at 9:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTF is up with my damn sig, hahaha.
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 04 2003 at 1:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OMG...you play SWG!!! and admit it! you're such a loser tard, loser tard!
Rare Drop
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2002 at 2:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781941012
16 posts
These earrings are uber rare. I have spent a total of about 35 hours camping the Chancellor of Dizoks Throne room killing sarnaks and have got two of em. Interesting enough they both dropped within 15 minutes of each other -- Both off of Sarnak Adherents. Now about that Faction for Chardok /groan
▲ Page top
Hehe...Funny Story
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2002 at 2:52 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759029167
4 posts
This dropped last night in Chardok, and wanna know the sad thing? I won the roll, actually noone else in the group even wanted it at all. What is sadder than that? I am a MAGE. So now for the funny story as to how I can upon this drop. I, 54 Mage, am grouped with a 61 BL, 58 Necro, Upper 50's Bard, Upper 50's Necro, and a 51 Cleric. We decided to take on the Lev Tunnel and move down it some. Everything was smooth until we pull the Cappy. Needless to say things went bad, wipe out except for one of the necro's, who got a FD off, INSIDE THE TUNNEL, NEAR CAPPY. Well we got the other necro to summon corpses and the cleric to rez our sorry carcasses, all the while the other Necro is still in the tunnel. Evidently he FD'ed right on top of one of the spawn points, and just as the Cappy was ready to leave, a new mob popped right there, with the necro too low on life to even consider doing anything. So we pull pets, and hack and slash our way through to the Lev tunnel, and after having to run once to save our skins we are getting close to him. So we pull the mob that popped on top of him, and the earring dropped. Being a group of mostly pet casters, noone even wanted it, I asked for rolls like 5 times, then rolled myself, hoping someone would follow suit, but nope, noone else wanted it. So I got me a shiny new trinket that I can wear to help me carry all that cash I make. And yes I will wear it, so don't flame me. And I know before they are even posted there are gonna be either "This is a tank, monk..blah, blah, blah item" or " Why would you use this?" comments. To answer them, I will just say that my Int is pretty high up there, not a 255 yet, but within 10 points of it, I am running FT1, and have over +500 mana from just mana items, and my strength is still really low, so I think I will be okay, also have not even got my epic yet so I will be way above the 255 Int mark, and frankly am not even worried about it. It's a great item, and honestly I wish a tank had been in the group to take it, but oh well, mines now =)

Ertae Invocatus
54th Elementalist, and Raid Officer
Sovereign Souls, Tholuxe Paells Server

# Mar 27 2002 at 4:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759217559
13 posts
We got one last night off a Sarnak Revenant in LOIO. We must have killed about 3 Revenants during the raid (From the back gate). Who knows how many we would have had to kill to get a second. We were in there about 3 hours real time?

Everyone was stoked to get one of these drop - except the guy who won the roll - go figure!

Still hanging out to get mine :)

Cerdan lvl22 Warrior
